mapper.select: SELECT widget_id as widgetId, username, gym_id as gymId, role, widget_key as widgetKey, is_active as isActive, has_data as hasData, sort_order as sortOrder, updated_at as updatedAt FROM "h_dashboard_widget" WHERE username = #{username} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, widget_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_dashboard_widget" (username, gym_id, role, widget_key, is_active, has_data, sort_order, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{gymId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{role}, #{widgetKey}, #{isActive}, #{hasData}, #{sortOrder}, now()) ON CONFLICT (username, widget_key) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT count(distinct d.gym_id) as "total", count(distinct case when d.signed_at >= date_trunc('month', current_date) then d.gym_id end) as "newThisMonth" FROM "h_contract_data" d WHERE d.contract = 1 AND d.status = 'SIGNED' AND (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date)

SELECT g.gym_name as "name", d.end_date as "endDate", (d.end_date - current_date) as "dday" FROM "h_contract_data" d LEFT JOIN "h_gym" g on d.gym_id = g.gym_id WHERE d.contract = 1 AND d.status = 'SIGNED' AND d.end_date BETWEEN current_date AND current_date + 30 ORDER BY d.end_date ASC
SELECT count(*) as "total", coalesce(round(avg((s.cost_rate + s.employee_rate + s.service_rate + s.equip_rate) / 4.0), 1), 0) as "averageScore" FROM "h_survey" s

SELECT count(distinct d.receiver_id) as "total", count(distinct case when d.signed_at >= date_trunc('month', current_date) then d.receiver_id end) as "newThisMonth" FROM "h_contract_data" d WHERE d.gym_id = #{gymId} AND d.contract in (3, 4, 5) AND d.status in ('SIGNED', 'ACTIVE') AND (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date)

SELECT d.receiver_name as "name", d.end_date as "endDate", (d.end_date - current_date) as "dday" FROM "h_contract_data" d WHERE d.gym_id = #{gymId} AND d.contract in (3, 4, 5) AND d.status in ('SIGNED', 'ACTIVE') AND d.end_date BETWEEN current_date AND current_date + 30 ORDER BY d.end_date ASC

SELECT count(*) as "total", coalesce(round(avg(m.visit_per_week), 1), 0) as "averageVisitPerWeek", coalesce(round(avg(m.aver_exercise), 1), 0) as "averageExerciseTime" FROM "h_model_data" m JOIN "h_member" mb on m.username = mb.username WHERE mb.gym_id = #{gymId}

SELECT count(*) as "total", coalesce(round(avg(r.churn_rate), 3), 0) as "averageChurnRate", count(case when r.churn_rate >= 0.7 then 1 end) as "highRiskCount" FROM ( SELECT distinct on (username) username, churn_rate FROM "h_churn_result" ORDER BY username, churn_date desc nulls last ) r JOIN "h_member" mb on r.username = mb.username WHERE mb.gym_id = #{gymId}

SELECT count(distinct d.receiver_id) as "total", count(distinct case when d.signed_at >= date_trunc('month', current_date) then d.receiver_id end) as "newThisMonth" FROM "h_contract_data" d WHERE d.manager_id = #{username} AND d.contract in (4, 5) AND d.status in ('SIGNED', 'ACTIVE') AND (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date)

SELECT d.receiver_name as "name", greatest(d.quantity - ( SELECT count(*) FROM "h_check_inout" i WHERE i.username = d.receiver_id AND i.check_in >= d.start_date ), 0) as "remain" FROM "h_contract_data" d WHERE d.manager_id = #{username} AND d.contract in (4, 5) AND d.status in ('SIGNED', 'ACTIVE') AND (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date) AND d.quantity is not null ORDER BY "remain" ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT to_char(i.check_in, 'YYYY-MM') as "month", count(*) as "total" FROM "h_check_inout" i WHERE i.check_in >= date_trunc('month', current_date) - interval '5 months' AND exists ( SELECT 1 FROM "h_contract_data" d WHERE d.manager_id = #{username} AND d.contract in (4, 5) AND d.status in ('SIGNED', 'ACTIVE') AND (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date) AND d.receiver_id = i.username ) GROUP BY to_char(i.check_in, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY "month" ASC

SELECT count(*) as "total", coalesce(round(avg(r.churn_rate), 3), 0) as "averageChurnRate", count(case when r.churn_rate >= 0.7 then 1 end) as "highRiskCount" FROM ( SELECT distinct on (username) username, churn_rate FROM "h_churn_result" ORDER BY username, churn_date desc nulls last ) r WHERE exists ( SELECT 1 FROM "h_contract_data" d WHERE d.manager_id = #{username} AND d.contract in (4, 5) AND d.status in ('SIGNED', 'ACTIVE') AND (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date) AND d.receiver_id = r.username )
